( 3) Pancha Maha Purusha Yogas: {S Yog.as for a great person).

If any of the five planets Mars. Mercury. jupiter. Venus and Saturn
are in own house or exaltation and simuttaneovsly in an angular
hous.e. they form the fl~ Mahapurusha Yog-as.
(i) Saturn so placed forms Saga Yogas.
(li) Jupiter so placed forms Hamsa Yog-a.
(iii) Mercury so placed forms Bhadra Yog-a.
(iv) Venus so placed forms Malavya Yoga.
(v) Mars so placed forms Ruchaka Yoga.
These Yogas make native daring. enterprising and give him leadership
qualities. The basic characteristics are according to the planet
concerned.
(4) Kahala Yoga: If dispositor of the ascendant lord is exalted or in
own :sign and is simultaneously in an angular or a trinat house Kahala
Yoga is formed. The native with a Kahala Yoga is enterprising,
brave. intelligent, cheerful. friendly and well respected by his
associates.
